# GitHub repo → Settings → General → About

Description:
ClipClipper — find ranked clip moments in long YouTube videos. Local yt-dlp, Whisper, and LLM fusion (replay, audio, chapters) → clips.json; optional ffmpeg cuts. No watermarks or clip credits.

Homepage (optional):
https://github.com/DontHash/Optimized-AI-ShortsGenerator

Topics:
youtube, python, whisper, yt-dlp, openai, gemini, ffmpeg, video-editing, llm, content-creation, clipclipper

# Sync via CLI (logged-in as DontHash)
gh repo edit DontHash/Optimized-AI-ShortsGenerator --description "ClipClipper — find ranked clip moments in long YouTube videos. Local yt-dlp, Whisper, and LLM fusion (replay, audio, chapters) → clips.json; optional ffmpeg cuts. No watermarks or clip credits." --homepage "https://github.com/DontHash/Optimized-AI-ShortsGenerator" --add-topic youtube --add-topic python --add-topic whisper --add-topic yt-dlp --add-topic openai --add-topic gemini --add-topic ffmpeg --add-topic video-editing --add-topic llm --add-topic content-creation --add-topic clipclipper
